_note: All element coordinates are fractions (0.0–1.0) of the *MobiGlas panel crop*, not the full screen. The parser locates the panel using _mobiglas constants before applying these values. Works for any 16:9 or wider aspect ratio; see _mobiglas for the geometry model.

_mobiglas._note: MobiGlas panel geometry relative to the game content area. The panel is height-proportional and horizontally centered; ultrawide displays show more background on the sides. These constants were derived from patch 4.8 at 1920×1080 and should be stable across aspect ratios. Re-derive if CIG changes UI scale defaults.

reputation._calibration_status: CALIBRATED — MobiGlas-relative. Validated at 16:9 1920×1080 (patch 4.8). Run calibrate.py to verify at other resolutions.

faction_title._note: Large heading: active faction name (upper-left of right panel, e.g. 'ADAGIO HOLDINGS')

relationship._note: Green sub-label directly below faction title (e.g. 'ALLY', 'NEUTRAL', 'ENEMY')

standing._note: Rank cells stacked under the STANDING header. Each cell has a thin progress bar at the TOP of the cell, then the rank label text centred below it.

bar_green._note: HSV range for SC UI progress-bar bright green (~RGB 85,218,95). The orange selected-cell glow is well below the bar strip so it does not interfere with measurement.
